chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-34 of 2025 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 09-07-2025 The applicant in person. Mr. Farooq Ahmed Gaad, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1. Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Khalid Hussain Shahani, J. The instant criminal transfer application has been filed by the applicant for transfer of I.D Complaint No.648/2024 from the Court of learned II- Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana to any other Court having jurisdiction only on the ground that the learned trial Court is lying vacant. Mr. Farooq Ahmed Gaad advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1 and he has graciously raised no objection if the above Case is withdrawn from the file of II-Additional Sessions, Larkana to any other Competent Court having jurisdiction. Learned D.P.G has also recorded his no objection to the above proposal. Expeditious trial is fundamental right of every individual. It has come on record that the trial court is vacant. In view of the above circumstances and by consent of both the parties, instant criminal transfer application is allowed. The case bearing I.D Complaint No. 648/2024 is hereby withdrawn from the file of learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana and made over to the Court of learned Sessions Judge, Larkana with directions to proceed 2 with the matter himself or transfer the same to any other court having jurisdiction for its disposal in accordance with law. In view of the above, instant criminal transfer application is disposed of.

The case bearing I.D Complaint No. 648/2024 is hereby withdrawn from the file of learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana and made over to the Court of learned Sessions Judge, Larkana with directions to proceed 2 with the matter himself or transfer the same to any other court having jurisdiction for its disposal in accordance with law. In view of the above, instant criminal transfer application is disposed of. Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
